name: SAP Concur Hotel Service API
description: Hotel Service v4 API provides a method for Custom Hotel Source suppliers to provide hotel inventory, rates, and booking related functionality to users of the SAP Concur Online Booking Tool (OBT). SAP Concur services act as client, pulling information from the hotel suppliers.
